title: hieracium alpinum subsp. nigrosetosum
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. nigrosetosum, commonly known as the Black-stemmed Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium alpinum plant, belonging to the dandelion family and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium alpinum subsp. nigrosetosum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or teas made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
